## **Overall System Architecture**

![][image1]

\---  
config:  
 layout: elk  
\---  
**flowchart** TB  
**subgraph** UI\["🖥 Presentation Layer (Jetpack Compose)"\]  
       TS\["Tool Selector"\]  
       HS\["Home Screen"\]  
       PS\["PDF Creation Screen"\]  
       CS\["Compression Screen"\]  
       CVS\["Conversion Screen"\]  
       MS\["Merge/Split Screen"\]  
 **end**  
**subgraph** Domain\["🧠 Domain Layer (Pure Kotlin)"\]  
       UC1\["CreatePdfUseCase"\]  
       UC2\["CompressPdfUseCase"\]  
       UC3\["ConvertPdfUseCase"\]  
       UC4\["MergePdfUseCase"\]  
       UC5\["SplitPdfUseCase"\]  
       UC6\["RotatePagesUseCase"\]  
 **end**  
**subgraph** Engine\["⚙️ Engine Layer (NDK \+ JVM)"\]  
       ME\["MuPDF Engine \- C/NDK"\]  
       PB\["PdfBox \- JVM"\]  
       IC\["Image Codec \- Skia/Bitmap"\]  
       DC\["DocConverter \- Apache POI"\]  
       CC\["Compression Core"\]  
 **end**  
**subgraph** Data\["💾 Data Layer"\]  
       SAF\["Storage Access Framework"\]  
       TC\["Temp Cache Manager"\]  
       PM\["Preferences Manager"\]  
       FM\["File Manager"\]  
 **end**  
**subgraph** Worker\["🔧 Background Worker"\]  
       WM\["WorkManager"\]  
       CR\["Coroutines \- IO Dispatcher"\]  
       PG\["Progress Tracker"\]  
 **end**  
   HS **\--\>** TS  
   TS **\--\>** PS **&** CS **&** CVS **&** MS  
   UI **\--\>** Domain  
   Domain **\--\>** Engine **&** Worker  
   Worker **\--\>** Engine  
   Engine **\--\>** Data  
   Data **\--\>** SAF

   style UI fill:\#dbe4ff,stroke:\#4a9eed  
   style Domain fill:\#e5dbff,stroke:\#8b5cf6  
   style Engine fill:\#ffd8a8,stroke:\#f59e0b  
   style Worker fill:\#ffc9c9,stroke:\#ef4444  
   style Data fill:\#d3f9d8,stroke:\#22c55e

## **Image to PDF \- Detailed Tech Flow**

![][image2]

\---  
config:  
 layout: elk  
\---  
**flowchart** TD  
   A(\[User selects Images\]) **\--\>** B\[SAF File Picker\\nOpens system chooser\]  
   B **\--\>** C{Multiple files?}  
   C **\--\>**|Single| D\[Load Bitmap\\nBitmapFactory.decodeStream\]  
   C **\--\>**|Batch| E\[Queue files\\ninto WorkManager\]  
   E **\--\>** D  
   D **\--\>** F{Image size\\n\> 10MB?}  
   F **\--\>**|Yes| G\[Downsample\\ninSampleSize calculation\]  
   F **\--\>**|No| H\[Direct load\]  
   G **\--\>** I\[BitmapRegionDecoder\\nfor streaming\]  
   H **\--\>** I  
   I **\--\>** J\[Apply user options\\nRotation / Quality\]  
   J **\--\>** K\[MuPDF JNI Bridge\\nmuPDF\_create\_document\]  
   K **\--\>** L\[Add Page\\nmuPDF\_add\_image\_page\]  
   L **\--\>** M{More images?}  
   M **\--\>**|Yes| D  
   M **\--\>**|No| N\[Save stream\\nmuPDF\_write\_to\_stream\]  
   N **\--\>** O\[SAF Write\\nContentResolver.openOutputStream\]  
   O **\--\>** P{Save\\nsuccessful?}  
   P **\--\>**|Yes| Q\[/Output PDF\\nUser Storage/\]  
   P **\--\>**|No| R\[Error Recovery\\nRetry / Notify\]  
   Q **\--\>** S(\[Share Intent / Done\])

   style A fill:\#a5d8ff  
   style Q fill:\#b2f2bb  
   style R fill:\#ffc9c9  
   style K fill:\#d0bfff  
   style I fill:\#fff3bf

## **PDF Merge \- Detailed Tech Flow**

![][image3]

\---  
config:  
 layout: elk  
\---  
**flowchart** TD  
   A(\[User selects PDFs to Merge\]) **\--\>** B\[SAF Multi-file Picker\]  
   B **\--\>** C\[Validate each PDF\\nCheck header magic bytes\]  
   C **\--\>** D{Any corrupted?}  
   D **\--\>**|Yes| E\[Report corrupted files\\nSkip or abort\]  
   D **\--\>**|No| F\[User sets page order\\nDrag-reorder UI\]  
   F **\--\>** G\[WorkManager Task\\nMerge enqueued\]  
   G **\--\>** H\[MuPDF JNI:\\nOpen doc A as source\]  
   H **\--\>** I\[MuPDF JNI:\\nOpen doc B as source\]  
   I **\--\>** J\[Create new PDF context\\nmuPDF\_new\_document\]  
   J **\--\>** K\[Stream pages from A\\npage-by-page, no full load\]  
   K **\--\>** L\[muPDF\_copy\_page\\nwith object streams\]  
   L **\--\>** M{More pages\\nfrom A?}  
   M **\--\>**|Yes| K  
   M **\--\>**|No| N\[Stream pages from B\]  
   N **\--\>** O\[muPDF\_copy\_page\]  
   O **\--\>** P{More docs?}  
   P **\--\>**|Yes| N  
   P **\--\>**|No| Q\[Apply metadata\\nstrip or preserve\]  
   Q **\--\>** R\[muPDF\_write\_linearized\\nOptimized for web/size\]  
   R **\--\>** S\[SAF Write Output\]  
   S **\--\>** T\[/Merged PDF\\nUser Storage/\]  
   T **\--\>** U(\[Cleanup temp refs\])

   style A fill:\#a5d8ff  
   style T fill:\#b2f2bb  
   style E fill:\#ffc9c9  
   style J fill:\#d0bfff

## **PDF Compression \- Multi-Strategy Tech Flow**

![][image4]

\---  
config:  
 layout: elk  
\---  
**flowchart** TD  
   A(\[User uploads PDF for Compression\]) **\--\>** B\[Parse PDF\\nmuPDF\_open\_document\]  
   B **\--\>** C\[Analyze PDF structure\\nCount images, fonts, objects\]  
   C **\--\>** D\[User selects strategy\]

   D **\--\>** E1\[Strategy: Reduce\\nImage Quality\]  
   D **\--\>** E2\[Strategy: Downscale\\nImages\]  
   D **\--\>** E3\[Strategy: Remove\\nMetadata\]  
   D **\--\>** E4\[Strategy: Object Stream\\nCompression\]  
   D **\--\>** E5\[Strategy: Font\\nSubsetting\]

   E1 **\--\>** F1\[Extract each image\\nmuPDF\_get\_image\_data\]  
   F1 **\--\>** G1\[Re-encode JPEG\\nquality \= user\_level\\nAndroid Bitmap compress\]  
   G1 **\--\>** H1\[Replace in PDF\\nobject stream\]

   E2 **\--\>** F2\[Check image DPI\\nvs target DPI\]  
   F2 **\--\>** G2{DPI \> target?}  
   G2 **\--\>**|Yes| H2\[Downsample bitmap\\nBitmap.createScaledBitmap\]  
   G2 **\--\>**|No| H3\[Skip \- already small\]  
   H2 **\--\>** H1

   E3 **\--\>** F3\[muPDF\_clean\_metadata\\nRemove XMP, EXIF, author\]  
   F3 **\--\>** I\[Merge strategies\\nApply all selected\]

   E4 **\--\>** F4\[muPDF\_rewrite\_objects\\nEnable object compression\\nFlate/Zlib streams\]  
   F4 **\--\>** I

   E5 **\--\>** F5\[Enumerate embedded fonts\]  
   F5 **\--\>** G5\[Extract used glyphs\\nfrom page content\]  
   G5 **\--\>** H5\[Subset font\\nremove unused glyphs\\nHarfBuzz subsetter\]  
   H5 **\--\>** I

   H1 **\--\>** I  
   H3 **\--\>** I  
   I\[Reconstruct PDF\\nmuPDF\_write\_optimized\] **\--\>** J\[SAF Write Output\]  
   J **\--\>** K\[Show size comparison\\nBefore vs After\]  
   K **\--\>** L\[/Compressed PDF/\]

   style A fill:\#a5d8ff  
   style L fill:\#b2f2bb  
   style I fill:\#d0bfff  
   style E1 fill:\#fff3bf  
   style E2 fill:\#fff3bf  
   style E3 fill:\#fff3bf  
   style E4 fill:\#fff3bf  
   style E5 fill:\#fff3bf

## **PDF to DOCX Conversion \- Offline Tech Flow**

![][image5]

\---  
config:  
 layout: elk  
\---  
**flowchart** TD  
   A(\[PDF to DOCX Conversion Request\]) **\--\>** B\[Open PDF\\nmuPDF\_open\_document\]  
   B **\--\>** C\[Page analysis pass\\nDetect layout type\]  
   C **\--\>** D{Layout Type?}

   D **\--\>**|Simple text| E\[Text Extraction Mode\\nmuPDF\_extract\_text\_blocks\]  
   D **\--\>**|Mixed layout| F\[Block Detection Mode\\nmuPDF\_get\_structured\_text\]  
   D **\--\>**|Scanned image| G\[OCR Mode\\nTesseract NDK integration\]

   E **\--\>** H\[TextBlock objects\\nwith coordinates\]  
   F **\--\>** H  
   G **\--\>** I\[OCR text output\\nwith confidence scores\]  
   I **\--\>** H

   H **\--\>** J\[Heuristic Layout Analysis\]  
   J **\--\>** K{Column\\nDetection}  
   K **\--\>**|1 column| L\[Single column parser\]  
   K **\--\>**|Multi-col| M\[Multi-col sorter\\nby x-coordinate bands\]  
   L **\--\>** N\[Paragraph grouping\\nby y-proximity\]  
   M **\--\>** N

   N **\--\>** O\[Font analysis\\nDetect heading hierarchy\\nby font size ratio\]  
   O **\--\>** P\[Table detection\\nGrid-line heuristics\]  
   P **\--\>** Q\[Image extraction\\nmuPDF\_get\_page\_images\]  
   Q **\--\>** R\[Apache POI\\nXWPFDocument builder\]  
   R **\--\>** S\[Map blocks to\\nParagraph / Heading /\\nTable / Image runs\]  
   S **\--\>** T\[Write .docx stream\\nXWPFDocument.write\]  
   T **\--\>** U\[SAF Write Output\]  
   U **\--\>** V\[/output.docx/\]

   W\[LIMITATION WARNING\\nComplex layouts may not\\nbe perfectly reproduced\] **\-.-\>**|Notify user| V

   style A fill:\#a5d8ff  
   style V fill:\#b2f2bb  
   style G fill:\#ffd8a8  
   style W fill:\#ffc9c9  
   style R fill:\#d0bfff

## **APK Size Architecture & Budget**

![][image6]

\---  
config:  
 layout: elk  
\---  
**graph** TB  
   **subgraph** APKSize\["APK Size Budget"\]  
       Core\["Core APK\\n\~25MB\\nKotlin \+ Compose UI\\n+ Basic PDF viewer"\]  
       NDK\["NDK Libs\\n\~45MB total\\nSplit per ABI\\narmeabi-v7a / arm64-v8a / x86\_64"\]  
       MuPDF\["MuPDF .so\\n\~8MB per ABI"\]  
       Tess\["Tesseract .so\\n\~15MB per ABI\\nLoaded on-demand"\]  
       APOI\["Apache POI\\n\~12MB JAR\\nOptional feature module"\]  
   **end**

   **subgraph** DFM\["Dynamic Feature Modules"\]  
       OCR\["feature\_ocr\\n\~20MB\\nLoaded on first OCR request"\]  
       CONV\["feature\_conversion\\n\~18MB\\nLoaded on first convert request"\]  
       SIGN\["feature\_signing\\n\~5MB\\nFuture phase"\]  
   **end**

   **subgraph** BuildOpt\["Build Optimizations"\]  
       ABI\["ABI Splits\\narmeabi-v7a: \~55MB\\narm64-v8a: \~60MB\\nx86\_64: \~65MB"\]  
       R8\["R8 Full Mode\\n+ Proguard rules\\nDead code elimination"\]  
       RES\["Resource shrinking\\nRemove unused drawables\\nWebP conversion"\]  
       BUNDLE\["Android App Bundle\\nPlay delivers only\\nneeded ABI \+ language"\]  
   **end**

   Core **\--\>** NDK  
   NDK **\--\>** MuPDF  
   NDK **\--\>** Tess  
   Core **\--\>** APOI  
   Core **\--\>** DFM  
   DFM **\--\>** OCR  
   DFM **\--\>** CONV  
   DFM **\--\>** SIGN  
   Core **\--\>** BuildOpt

   style APKSize fill:\#dbe4ff  
   style DFM fill:\#e5dbff  
   style BuildOpt fill:\#d3f9d8

## **Module Dependency Graph**

![][image7]

\---  
config:  
 layout: elk  
\---  
**graph** LR  
   **subgraph** Modules\["Module Dependency Graph"\]  
       APP\[":app\\nUI Shell\\nNavigation Host"\]  
        
       **subgraph** FeatureModules\["Feature Modules"\]  
           FP\[":feature:pdf\_creation"\]  
           FC\[":feature:compression"\]  
           FV\[":feature:conversion"\]  
           FM\[":feature:merge\_split"\]  
       **end**

       **subgraph** DomainModules\["Domain Modules"\]  
           DC\[":domain:core\\nUseCases\\nRepositories Interfaces"\]  
           DM\[":domain:models\\nPdfDocument\\nPageInfo\\nOperationResult"\]  
       **end**

       **subgraph** DataModules\["Data Modules"\]  
           DI\[":data:impl\\nRepository Impls\\nSAF Adapter"\]  
           DS\[":data:storage\\nTempFileManager\\nPrefsDataStore"\]  
       **end**

       **subgraph** EngineModules\["Engine Modules"\]  
           EM\[":engine:mupdf\\nJNI Bindings\\nC Library"\]  
           EP\[":engine:pdfbox\\nApache PDFBox\\nJVM only"\]  
           EI\[":engine:imageproc\\nBitmap ops\\nSkia wrapper"\]  
           ET\[":engine:tesseract\\nOCR \- optional\\nDynamic load"\]  
           EC\[":engine:converter\\nApache POI\\nDOCX/PPTX"\]  
       **end**

       **subgraph** CommonModules\["Common Modules"\]  
           CU\[":common:ui\\nDesign system\\nCompose components"\]  
           CC\[":common:utils\\nExtensions\\nError handling"\]  
       **end**  
   **end**

   APP **\--\>** FP **&** FC **&** FV **&** FM  
   FP **&** FC **&** FV **&** FM **\--\>** DC  
   DC **\--\>** DM  
   DC **\--\>** DI  
   DI **\--\>** DS  
   DC **\--\>** EM **&** EP **&** EI  
   FC **\--\>** EM  
   FV **\--\>** EC **&** ET  
   FP **\--\>** EI **&** EM  
   APP **\--\>** CU  
   FP **&** FC **&** FV **&** FM **\--\>** CU **&** CC

   style APP fill:\#a5d8ff  
   style FeatureModules fill:\#dbe4ff  
   style DomainModules fill:\#e5dbff  
   style DataModules fill:\#d3f9d8  
   style EngineModules fill:\#ffd8a8  
   style CommonModules fill:\#c3fae8
